headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Biogen, Raises Price Target to $206
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Matthew Harrison   maintains Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $200 to $206.

headline: Biogen Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Upbeat Q1 Earnings
summary: Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) reported strong Q1 earnings, beating expectations. However, they cut their FY2026 EPS guidance. Analysts have mixed opinions on buying BIIB stock.
